description: A vertical graphic on a black background. A red tab at the top reads VIETNAM. The center holds a booking-style photograph of a middle-aged man in a teal top against a height-chart wall. A red banner across the lower portion reads SEXUAL ASSAULT, and a banner at the bottom shows the Department of Homeland Security seal with the text ICE in Aurora Colorado.
notable_text: VIETNAM; SEXUAL ASSAULT; ICE in Aurora Colorado
